prompt: A breathtaking anime-style landscape featuring a vibrant, starry night sky dominated by a brilliant, sweeping Milky Way in hues of deep purple, blue, and magenta. Two prominent shooting stars, one glowing bright blue and the other a softer pinkish-red, streak downwards across the sky, their tails intersecting. In the center of the sky, written in elegant, glowing cursive neon-like script, is the text "Your Name", underlined by a delicate pink line that forms a small bow in the middle. Below, a serene landscape unfolds with dark, silhouetted clouds framing the edges. A distant town with glowing city lights sits nestled along the shores of a calm lake, reflecting the twilight colors of the horizon where the sun has just set, leaving a gradient of pink and orange. The foreground features dark silhouettes of grassy hills and subtle hints of purple flowers, adding depth to this magical, cinematic scene reminiscent of Makoto Shinkai's art style.
